mapping_description: SPAKEERU: mapping to load data from ST_CG1_XSCM_MK_RECOMIT_IBIFACE to the table W_CM_PULL_IN_MESSAGE

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
RANK () OVER (ORDER BY SXCMRI.MESSAGE_ID, SXCMRI.ORDER_NUMBER, SXCMRI.LINE_NUMBER ) + MAX_VAL CM_PULL_IN_MESSAGE_KEY,
       SXCMRI.MESSAGE_ID AS MESSAGE_ID,
	   	   SXCMRI.LINE_NUMBER,
		   SXCMRI.ORDER_NUMBER 
FROM 
(
SELECT ST.MESSAGE_ID, ST.ORDER_NUMBER, ST.LINE_NUMBER FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_XSCM_PL_PBM_RECMIT_DATA ST
UNION
SELECT EX.MESSAGE_ID, EX.ORDER_NUMBER, EX.LINE_NUMBER  FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_XSCM_PL_PBM_RECMIT_DATA EX
)SXCMRI,
(SELECT COALESCE (MAX (CM_PULL_IN_MESSAGE_KEY), 0) MAX_VAL FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_CM_PULL_IN_MESSAGE) SM
WHERE NOT EXISTS
( SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_CM_PULL_IN_MESSAGE SMP WHERE 
SMP.SK_MESSAGE_ID = SXCMRI.MESSAGE_ID and 
SMP.SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT = SXCMRI.ORDER_NUMBER and
SMP.SALES_ORDER_LINE_NUM_INT = SXCMRI.LINE_NUMBER
)

SELECT 
SM.CM_PULL_IN_MESSAGE_KEY AS CM_PULL_IN_MESSAGE_KEY,
COALESCE(MTBKG.SHIPSET_VALUE_USD_AMT,MTBKG1.SHIPSET_VALUE_USD_AMT, 0.0000000) AS SHIPSET_VALUE_USD_AMT,
ST.MESSAGE_ID	AS 	SK_MESSAGE_ID,
ST.RECOMMENDED_SSD	AS 	PROPOSED_SCHEDULED_SHIP_DT,
ST.SUGGESTED_PDATE AS 	PROPOSED_PROMISE_DT,
COALESCE(ST.RECOMMIT_REASON, 'UNKNOWN')	AS 	PULL_IN_REASON_CD,
COALESCE(ST.CISCO_DETAIL_RECOMMIT_REASON, 'UNKNOWN')	AS 	CISCO_DETAIL_REASON_CD,
COALESCE(ST.PULL_IN_COMMENTS, 'UNKNOWN')	AS 	PULL_IN_COMMENT,
COALESCE(ST.AMP_USER_NAME, 'UNKNOWN')	AS 	CM_EMPLOYEE_NAME ,
COALESCE(ST.PROCESS_STATUS, 'UNKNOWN')	AS 	PROCESS_STATUS_CD,
COALESCE(ST.ERROR_CODE, 'UNKNOWN')	AS 	B2B_ERROR_CD ,
COALESCE(ST.ERROR_MESSAGE, 'UNKNOWN')	AS 	B2B_ERROR_MESSAGE_TXT ,
CAST (ST.TRANSMISSION_DATE AS TIMESTAMP (0))	AS 	TRANSMISSION_DTM ,
CAST (ST.TRANSMISSION_DATE AS DATE )	AS 	DV_TRANSMISSION_DT ,
COALESCE(MTBKG.DD_MB_SCHEDULED_SHIP_DT	,MTBKG1.DD_MB_SCHEDULED_SHIP_DT	) AS CURRENT_SCHEDULED_SHIP_DT ,
COALESCE(MTBKG.DD_MB_PRMSD_TO_CUST_SHPMT_DT,MTBKG1.DD_MB_PRMSD_TO_CUST_SHPMT_DT)	AS 	CURRENT_PROMISE_DT ,
COALESCE(MTBKG.PLANNER_RQSTD_SHIP_DT, MTBKG1.PLANNER_RQSTD_SHIP_DT)	AS 	PLANNER_REQUESTED_SHIP_DT ,
COALESCE(MTBKG.LEAD_TIME_TGT_SCHDLD_SHIP_DT, MTBKG1.LEAD_TIME_TGT_SCHDLD_SHIP_DT)	AS 	TARGET_SCHEDULED_SHIP_DT,
COALESCE(MTBKG.LEAD_TIME_PROMISED_TGT_DT, MTBKG1.LEAD_TIME_PROMISED_TGT_DT)	AS 	TARGET_PROMISE_DT,

CASE WHEN MTBKG.SHPMNT_SECONDARY_PRIORITY_CD IS NOT NULL AND  MTBKG.SHPMNT_SECONDARY_PRIORITY_CD <> 'UNKNOWN' THEN MTBKG.SHPMNT_SECONDARY_PRIORITY_CD
	WHEN MTBKG.PMB_PRIORITY_BASIS_CD IS NOT NULL AND  MTBKG.SHPMNT_SECONDARY_PRIORITY_CD = 'UNKNOWN' AND MTBKG.PMB_PRIORITY_BASIS_CD <> 'UNKNOWN' THEN MTBKG.PMB_PRIORITY_BASIS_CD
	WHEN MTBKG.SHPMNT_SECONDARY_PRIORITY_CD IS NULL AND MTBKG.PMB_PRIORITY_BASIS_CD IS NULL AND MTBKG1.SHPMNT_SECONDARY_PRIORITY_CD IS NOT NULL AND   MTBKG1.SHPMNT_SECONDARY_PRIORITY_CD <> 'UNKNOWN' THEN MTBKG1.SHPMNT_SECONDARY_PRIORITY_CD
	WHEN MTBKG.SHPMNT_SECONDARY_PRIORITY_CD IS NULL AND MTBKG.PMB_PRIORITY_BASIS_CD IS NULL AND MTBKG1.SHPMNT_SECONDARY_PRIORITY_CD = 'UNKNOWN' AND  MTBKG1.PMB_PRIORITY_BASIS_CD <> 'UNKNOWN' THEN MTBKG1.PMB_PRIORITY_BASIS_CD
ELSE NULL END AS 	SHPMNT_SECONDARY_PRIORITY_CD,
/*COALESCE(MTBKG.SHPMNT_SECONDARY_PRIORITY_CD, MTBKG.PMB_PRIORITY_BASIS_CD, MTBKG1.SHPMNT_SECONDARY_PRIORITY_CD, MTBKG1.PMB_PRIORITY_BASIS_CD)	AS 	SHPMNT_SECONDARY_PRIORITY_CD  	,*/
COALESCE(NSSCR. ACTION_STATUS_CD, 'UNKNOWN') AS SHIPSET_STATUS_CD     ,
COALESCE(ST.LINE_NUMBER, -999)  AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_NUM_INT      ,
COALESCE(ST.ORDER_NUMBER, -999) AS SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT      ,
COALESCE(NSOLV.DD_TOP_MODEL_SLS_ORDR_LINE_KEY, -999) as TOP_MODEL_SOL_KEY,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM	,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER	,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM	,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER	,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE	,
'I' AS DML_TYPE	,
COALESCE(MTBKG.DV_CONSOLIDATION_FLG  , 'N') AS DV_CONSOLIDATION_FLG,
COALESCE(MTBKG.DV_CONSOLIDATED_SET_ID_INT , -999) AS DV_CONSOLIDATED_SET_ID_INT,
COALESCE(CAST(MTBKG.DV_INTRMDT_PROMISE_SHIP_DT  AS DATE),CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE ) ) AS DV_INTRMDT_PROMISE_SHIP_DT,
COALESCE(CAST(MTBKG.DV_INTRMDT_PROMISE_DLVRY_DT AS DATE),CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE ) ) AS DV_INTRMDT_PROMISE_DLVRY_DT
FROM 
(SELECT MESSAGE_ID	, RECOMMIT_DATE	, ATTRIBUTE1	, RECOMMIT_REASON	, CISCO_DETAIL_RECOMMIT_REASON	, PULL_IN_COMMENTS	, AMP_USER_NAME	, PROCESS_STATUS	, ERROR_CODE	, ERROR_MESSAGE	,  TRANSMISSION_DATE, ORDER_NUMBER, LINE_NUMBER, CREATION_DATE, SUGGESTED_PDATE, RECOMMENDED_SSD 	 	 FROM  $$STGDB.ST_CG1_XSCM_PL_PBM_RECMIT_DATA STG 
UNION ALL 
SELECT MESSAGE_ID	, RECOMMIT_DATE	, ATTRIBUTE1	, RECOMMIT_REASON	, CISCO_DETAIL_RECOMMIT_REASON	, PULL_IN_COMMENTS	, AMP_USER_NAME	, PROCESS_STATUS	, ERROR_CODE	, ERROR_MESSAGE	,  TRANSMISSION_DATE, ORDER_NUMBER, LINE_NUMBER, CREATION_DATE, SUGGESTED_PDATE, RECOMMENDED_SSD 	 	 FROM  $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_XSCM_PL_PBM_RECMIT_DATA EX 
) ST
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_CM_PULL_IN_MESSAGE SM ON 
SM.SK_MESSAGE_ID = ST.MESSAGE_ID
AND SM.SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT = ST.ORDER_NUMBER
AND SM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_NUM_INT = ST.LINE_NUMBER
INNER JOIN 
(SELECT SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE  WHERE 
 ITEM_TYPE_CODE  IN ('MODEL', 'STANDARD') AND BK_OPTION_NUMBER_INT = 0 
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT, BK_OPTION_NUMBER_INT  ORDER BY EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME  ASC )= 1
 ) NSOLT ON 
NSOLT.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT  = ST.ORDER_NUMBER      AND   NSOLT.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT = ST.LINE_NUMBER

INNER JOIN
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV NSOLV
ON NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOLV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY

LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_SOL_MFG_BKLG_DAILY_SNAPSHOT  MTBKG ON
NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = MTBKG.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND ST.TRANSMISSION_DATE - INTERVAL '1'  DAY = MTBKG.SNAPSHOT_DATE

LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_SOL_MFG_BKLG_DAILY_SNAPSHOT  MTBKG1 ON
NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = MTBKG1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND ST.TRANSMISSION_DATE  = MTBKG1.SNAPSHOT_DATE

LEFT JOIN(SELECT BK_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,BK_CREATE_DTM, ACTION_STATUS_CD,SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT  , BK_SHIPSET_NUM_INT FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SOL_SCHDLNG_CHANGE_REASON  
 WHERE ACTION_MODE_TYPE= 'R' AND TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD = 'PROACTIVE PULL IN'
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY BK_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  ORDER BY SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT  DESC )= 1)   NSSCR 
ON  NSSCR.BK_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=MTBKG.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND MTBKG.DD_MB_SHIPSET_NUM = NSSCR.BK_SHIPSET_NUM_INT            
AND MTBKG.SNAPSHOT_DATE=(CAST(NSSCR.BK_CREATE_DTM AS DATE)-1)

SELECT SCXPRD.MESSAGE_ID, SCXPRD.ORGANIZATION_CODE, SCXPRD.ORDER_NUMBER, SCXPRD.SHIP_SET_NUMBER, SCXPRD.LINE_NUMBER, SCXPRD.PID, SCXPRD.ORDER_DATE_TYPE_CODE, SCXPRD.IMPROVED_TANS, SCXPRD.CURRENT_SSD, SCXPRD.RECOMMENDED_SSD, SCXPRD.CURRENT_SAD, SCXPRD.NEW_SAD, SCXPRD.CURRENT_PDATE, SCXPRD.SUGGESTED_PDATE, SCXPRD.RECOMMIT_REASON, SCXPRD.CISCO_DETAIL_RECOMMIT_REASON, SCXPRD.PULL_IN_QUANTITY, SCXPRD.PULL_IN_COMMENTS, SCXPRD.AMP_USER_NAME, SCXPRD.PROCESS_STATUS, SCXPRD.ERROR_CODE, SCXPRD.ERROR_MESSAGE, SCXPRD.TRANSMISSION_DATE, SCXPRD.OLD_PDATE_FISCAL_WEEK, SCXPRD.NEW_PDATE_FISCAL_WEEK, SCXPRD.TRANS_DATE_FISCAL_WEEK, SCXPRD.SHIP_SET_STATUS, SCXPRD.SECONDARY_PRIORITY, SCXPRD.SS_DAYS_IMPROVED, SCXPRD.RECOMMIT_DATE, SCXPRD.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, SCXPRD.CREATED_BY, SCXPRD.CREATION_DATE, SCXPRD.REQUEST_ID, SCXPRD.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, SCXPRD.LAST_UPDATED_BY, SCXPRD.ATTRIBUTE1, SCXPRD.ATTRIBUTE2, SCXPRD.ATTRIBUTE3, SCXPRD.ATTRIBUTE4, SCXPRD.ATTRIBUTE5, SCXPRD.ATTRIBUTE6, SCXPRD.ATTRIBUTE7, SCXPRD.ATTRIBUTE8, SCXPRD.ATTRIBUTE9, SCXPRD.ATTRIBUTE10, SCXPRD.ATTRIBUTE11, SCXPRD.ATTRIBUTE12, SCXPRD.ATTRIBUTE13, SCXPRD.ATTRIBUTE14, SCXPRD.ATTRIBUTE15, SCXPRD.ATTRIBUTE16, SCXPRD.ATTRIBUTE17, SCXPRD.ATTRIBUTE18, SCXPRD.ATTRIBUTE19, SCXPRD.ATTRIBUTE20, SCXPRD.GLOBAL_NAME, SCXPRD.CREATE_DATETIME, 'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
 $$STGDB.ST_CG1_XSCM_PL_PBM_RECMIT_DATA SCXPRD
 
  WHERE NOT EXISTS ( 
SELECT 1 FROM 
(SELECT SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE  WHERE  ITEM_TYPE_CODE  IN ('MODEL', 'STANDARD') AND BK_OPTION_NUMBER_INT = 0
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT  ORDER BY EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME  ASC )= 1
) NBKG
 WHERE 
 NBKG.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT  = SCXPRD.ORDER_NUMBER      AND   NBKG.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT = SCXPRD.LINE_NUMBER )
